task_description: Implement S44H (Top Bar Redesign All Platforms), S44I (Light/Dark Theme Polish), and S44J (Keyboard + Touch Enhancements) for the Mio Flutter chat app. Updates chat_screen.dart top bar with responsive layout and action buttons, refreshes the color system and theme definitions, and adds keyboard shortcuts, haptics, long-press menus, and scroll-to-bottom behavior.
